meta.title: The Realignment - Ep. 9: Rachel Bovard, The Conservative Case for Regulating Big Tech
meta.description:
Rachel Bovard, senior adviser to the Internet Accountability Project, joins The Realignment to argue that tech companies can be as much a threat to privacy and free speech as government. 

Subscribe to be notified about new episodes every week:

Spotify: https://spoti.fi/2Kb1kyz
Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast...
Google Podcasts: https://bit.ly/2Ox1d4o
Stitcher: https://bit.ly/2OAjqy9

Learn more about The Realignment at: https://www.hudson.org/
